summary: Reporter encounters compiler errors (CS0117, CS1501) when upgrading from SkiaSharp 2.88.9 to 3.x because SKMatrix.MakeTranslation, MakeScale, MakeRotation, MakeIdentity, and static PostConcat were renamed/replaced with Create* instance methods in the 3.0 breaking changes.

stepsToReproduce: Attempt to compile code using SKMatrix.MakeTranslation, MakeScale, MakeRotation, MakeIdentity, and static PostConcat
Observe compiler errors CS0117 and CS1501
reproEvidence.environmentDetails: Blazor WASM, Visual Studio on Windows 11, SkiaSharp 3.118.0-preview.2

versionAnalysis.relevanceReason: The old Make* static methods were removed (obsoleted in 3.0.0 breaking changes, then fully removed). The Create* replacements are current API.

analysis.summary: This is a migration question, not a bug. SKMatrix API was intentionally renamed in SkiaSharp 3.0: Make* → Create*, and static PostConcat(ref, matrix) → instance PostConcat(matrix). The breaking changes are documented in changelogs/SkiaSharp/3.0.0/SkiaSharp.breaking.md. A community member and the maintainer have already explained this in the comments.
analysis.rationale: The reporter labels this as a bug, but the compiler errors are expected when upgrading across a major version with intentional breaking changes. The old APIs were marked [Obsolete] in the 3.0 changelog and replaced with Create* equivalents. This is a usage/migration question, not a defect. The maintainer confirmed this in comments.

keySignals.text: CS0117: 'SKMatrix' does not contain a definition for 'MakeTranslation'
keySignals.interpretation: Compiler error confirms the old API was removed — expected behavior after major version upgrade.

keySignals.text: CS1501: No overload for method 'PostConcat' takes 2 arguments
keySignals.interpretation: PostConcat changed from static(ref, matrix) to instance(matrix) — documented breaking change.

keySignals.text: This isn't a bug. The API has changed - you need to update your code.
keySignals.interpretation: Community member correctly identified this as a migration issue.

keySignals.text: Some of those apis were obsolete and were replaced.
keySignals.interpretation: Maintainer confirmed the intentional API rename and pointed to updated docs.

codeInvestigation.finding: CreateIdentity() and CreateTranslation(float, float) are the current replacements for the removed MakeIdentity() and MakeTranslation(). Same logic, new names.
CreateScale and CreateRotation methods replace MakeScale and MakeRotation with identical signatures (except the name prefix).
PostConcat is now an instance method returning a new SKMatrix, not a static method with ref parameter. Usage: matrix = matrix.PostConcat(other) instead of SKMatrix.PostConcat(ref matrix, other).
All Make* methods are listed as [Obsolete] in the 3.0.0 breaking changes, confirming the intentional rename to Create*. PostConcat static overloads are also listed as obsolete.

workarounds: Replace SKMatrix.MakeTranslation(x, y) with SKMatrix.CreateTranslation(x, y)
Replace SKMatrix.MakeScale(sx, sy, px, py) with SKMatrix.CreateScale(sx, sy, px, py)
Replace SKMatrix.MakeRotation(radians, px, py) with SKMatrix.CreateRotation(radians, px, py)
Replace SKMatrix.PostConcat(ref matrix, other) with matrix = matrix.PostConcat(other)

resolution.hypothesis: Reporter needs to update code to use the renamed Create* APIs introduced in SkiaSharp 3.0.

proposals.title: Rename Make* to Create*
proposals.description: Replace all Make* calls with their Create* equivalents. The signatures are identical except for the method name prefix.

resolution.recommendedReason: Direct 1:1 rename. The Create* methods have the same parameters and behavior as the old Make* methods.

actionability.reason: This is a migration question already answered by a community member and the maintainer. The breaking changes are documented and the fix is a simple rename.

actions.description: Reclassify as question (migration help), add WASM platform
Post migration guide with code mapping
actions.comment:
This is an expected API change in SkiaSharp 3.x. The `Make*` static methods were renamed to `Create*`, and `PostConcat` changed from a static method to an instance method:

| Old (2.88.x) | New (3.x) |
|---|---|
| `SKMatrix.MakeIdentity()` | `SKMatrix.CreateIdentity()` |
| `SKMatrix.MakeTranslation(x, y)` | `SKMatrix.CreateTranslation(x, y)` |
| `SKMatrix.MakeScale(sx, sy, px, py)` | `SKMatrix.CreateScale(sx, sy, px, py)` |
| `SKMatrix.MakeRotation(r, px, py)` | `SKMatrix.CreateRotation(r, px, py)` |
| `SKMatrix.PostConcat(ref m, other)` | `m = m.PostConcat(other)` |

The breaking changes are documented in the [3.0.0 changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/blob/main/changelogs/SkiaSharp/3.0.0/SkiaSharp.breaking.md).

actions.description: Close as answered — migration question resolved
